models.name: metric_trends
models.description: Time-series analysis table containing historical trends for compliance metrics including daily completion rate trends, velocity calculations, acceleration, trend direction, change percentages, and next-period forecasts. Purpose: Trend analysis and predictive analytics table for compliance metrics, enabling detection of improving or declining trends over time. Provides time-series data with period-over-period comparisons, trend direction (improving, stable, declining), velocity (rate of change), and forecasts. Essential for trend monitoring, early detection of declining compliance metrics, and predictive analysis. Used in queries to analyze training completion rate trends over the last 30 days, to identify improving or declining metrics, to forecast future metric values, to calculate change percentages between periods, and to detect early warning signs of compliance issues. Links to risk_metrics_snapshot via metric_name to provide trend context for current metric values.

properties.description: Base metric being trended Examples: e.g., mandatory_training_completion_rate, critical_skill_gap_count.
Aggregation level Examples: e.g., org, division.
Specific entity Examples: e.g., ALL, Engineering, Accounting.
Time window Examples: e.g., daily, monthly.
Latest metric value Examples: e.g., 87.5, 15, 92.3, etc..
Prior period value Examples: e.g., 85.0, 18, 89.1, etc..
Trajectory Examples: e.g., improving, stable, declining.
Rate of change per day Examples: e.g., 0.08, -0.1, 0.11, etc..

properties.kpis: [{"name": "Improving Trends", "sql": "COUNT(*) WHERE trend_direction='improving'"}, {"name": "Average Velocity", "sql": "AVG(velocity) GROUP BY metric_name"}, {"name": "Volatile Metrics", "sql": "COUNT(DISTINCT metric_name) WHERE trend_direction='volatile'"}]
properties.queryPatterns: ["Analyze trend direction over time (WHERE trend_direction='improving'/'declining')", "Calculate velocity and acceleration for metric change rates", "Forecast future values using forecast_next_period", "Compare current vs previous values using change_percentage", "Filter by metric_name for specific compliance metric trends"]
properties.useCases: ["Trend Analysis: Monitor compliance metric trends over time (improving, stable, declining)", "Predictive Analytics: Forecast future metric values using forecast_next_period", "Early Warning: Detect declining trends before they become critical issues", "Velocity Tracking: Measure rate of change in compliance metrics (velocity and acceleration)", "Performance Monitoring: Compare period-over-period changes using change_percentage"]
